rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 - Metasploit Wrap-Up 03/27/2026
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/04/02
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*docs.metasploit.com*'
            - '*gregdurys.security*'
            - '*proton.me*'
    condition: selection_dns
level: high
